name: Tiny Troy
appearance: Polished stylized 3D caricature with warm brown skin, large expressive brown eyes, short dark hair, neatly shaped full black beard and mustache, small stud earrings, and a brown fedora.
wardrobe: Clean modern automotive-sales outfit; blue or neutral top unless the project specifies otherwise.
personality: Confident, approachable, energetic, trustworthy, and family-friendly.
continuityRules: Keep the full black beard and mustache
Keep warm brown skin and large brown eyes
Do not redesign facial proportions between scenes
Keep wardrobe consistent across one project
negativePrompt: No child version, no clean-shaven face, no missing fedora, no different ethnicity, no distorted hands, no malformed logos, no duplicate limbs, no text gibberish.

name: Speedy
appearance: Small energetic helper mascot with a polished stylized 3D appearance and a fast, upbeat visual identity.
wardrobe: Brand-coordinated helper outfit suited to the current project.
continuityRules: Maintain the same proportions and face
Keep colors consistent within a project
Do not replace Tiny Troy as the lead unless requested
negativePrompt: No frightening expression, no random costume changes, no duplicate limbs, no text gibberish.
